findings.title: finding
findings.message:
Verify each finding against current code. Fix only still-valid issues, skip the rest with a brief reason, keep changes minimal, and validate.

In @.polaris/clusters/POL-542/cluster-state.json around lines 13 - 17, Update the packet and result pointers in the cluster state to use repository-relative paths beginning with .polaris instead of workstation-specific absolute paths. Ensure pointer resolution joins these paths with the repository root when reading, and apply the same normalization to .taskchain_artifacts/polaris-run/current-state.json.

Verify each finding against current code. Fix only still-valid issues, skip the rest with a brief reason, keep changes minimal, and validate.

In @.taskchain_artifacts/polaris-run/current-state.json around lines 3 - 20, Remove the generated current-state.json artifact from the delivery commit; do not include files under .taskchain_artifacts in committed changes. If durable run state is required, promote it through polaris finalize into the established .polaris/runs/<run-id>/ location instead.

Verify each finding against current code. Fix only still-valid issues, skip the rest with a brief reason, keep changes minimal, and validate.

In @.taskchain_artifacts/polaris-run/current-state.json around lines 33 - 59, Update the completion handling for child POL-543 so its entry is removed from active open_children_meta when the child reaches status done, preventing resume or dispatch logic from redispatching it. Keep historical dispatch details separately if needed, but ensure active-child metadata only contains pending children and remains consistent with open_children.
